Part.Source: Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WPSELECIONARFATURAR', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) // AlertaDevolucao.Visible = 0 loadwwpContext.Call(&wwpContext) &PedCod = &parPedCod &PossuiModuloAGRO_INSUMOS = RetornaEmpresaModulo.UDP(&wwpContext.EmpCod, ModuloSistema.AGRO_INSUMOS) do 'loadpedido' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TranRedes.Width = 600 tbCliente.Width = 600 tbKc.Width = 600 &oldUpdTabCod.Visible = False &PedTraRedCod.Visible = False &LctTip.Visible = False &LctCod.Visible = False Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = Page.Rows &GridCurrentPage = 1 &GridCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPageCount = -1 GridsdtPedidoss_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridsdtPedidoss.InternalName GridsdtPedidoss.Rows = Page.Rows GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows GridsdtPedidossPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridsdtPedidoss.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ do 'VisibleIvisible' Do 'VerificaDevolucoes' EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'CheckSecurityForActions' //The variable '&GridPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. &GridsdtPedidossCurrentPage = GridsdtPedidoss.CurrentPage &GridsdtPedidossPageCount = GridsdtPedidoss.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridRecordCount = Grid.RecordCount EndEvent Event Grid.Load //tableMain.Visible = 1 &PedQtd = PedQtd /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &actioUpdaa = !'' &actioUpda = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do case Case PedItmPrm = domPedItmPrm.PROMOCAO PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) PedVlrItm.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) Case PedItmPrm = domPedItmPrm.DESCONTO PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) PedVlrItm.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) Otherwise PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) PedVlrItm.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndCase &ProNom.Link = VerProduto.Link('DashBoard', EmpCod, ProCod) &ProNom.LinkTarget = '_blank' If not PedItmCmp.IsEmpty() &ProNom = ProNom + ' ' + trim(PedItmCmp) Else &ProNom = ProNom EndIf EndEvent Event GridsdtPedidoss.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridCurrentPage -= 1 Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridCurrentPage += 1 Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridCurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridCurrentPage = 1 Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridsdtPedidossPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridsdtPedidossPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' GridsdtPedidoss.PreviousPage() Case GridsdtPedidossPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &PageToGo = GridsdtPedidoss.CurrentPage &PageToGo += 1 GridsdtPedidoss.GotoPage(&PageToGo) Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridsdtPedidossPaginationBar.SelectedPage) GridsdtPedidoss.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridsdtPedidossPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridsdtPedidoss.Rows = GridsdtPedidossPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue GridsdtPedidoss.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoBackreturn' Do Case Case &DeOndeVem = 'WPSELECIONARFATURAR' wpSelecionarFaturar.Link() CAse &DeOndeVem = 'WWPEDIDOVENDA' wwPedidoVenda.Link() Case &DeOndeVem = 'WPSELECIONARFATURAR' wpRemessaAmbulante.Link() Case &DeOndeVem = 'WWOFICINAMECANICA' wwOficinaMecanica.Link() Case &DeOndeVem = 'wwPedidoBalcao' wwPedidoBalcao.Link() CAse &DeOndeVem = 'WPREMESSAAMBULANTE' WPREMESSAAMBULANTE.Link() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoImprimir' do 'loadTipoLancamento' if &IsErroTipoLancamento = false do 'LoadCliente' if &IsErroCliente = false if &PossuiModuloAGRO_INSUMOS = 'S' do 'propriedadecliente' Endif if &IsErroPropriedade = False //and &IsErroGleba = false //If &PedFrpTip = TipoDuplicata.DEPOSITO and &PedCbrCod.IsEmpty() // &mensagem = 'Informado Tipo de Pagamento: DEPOSITO/TRANSF. e NÃO INFORMADO o Local Cobrança/Conta Bancária' // do 'mensagemErro' // &PedCbrCod.SetFocus() //Else if &PedTipFrt <> '9' do 'LoadTransportadoraRedespacho' Endif if &IsErroTransportadoraRedespacho = false or &PedTipFrt = '9' CarregaSdtPedidoVenda.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &sdtGravaPedido) //ADICIONA CAMPOS ALTERADOS &sdtGravaPedido.PedCliCod = &PedCliCod &sdtGravaPedido.LctCod = &LctCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedPrpCod = &PedPrpCod //TRANSPORTE &sdtGravaPedido.PedTraRedCod = &PedTraRedCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedTipFrt = &PedTipFrt &sdtGravaPedido.PedTraSaiCod = &PedTraRedCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedTipSaiFrt = &PedTipFrt &sdtGravaPedido.PedObsNfe = &PedObsNfe &sdtGravaPedido.PedObsGer = &PedObsNfe &sdtGravaPedido.PedVlrDscGlb = &PedVlrDscGlb &sdtGravaPedido.PedVlrOut = &PedVlrOut &sdtGravaPedido.PedFrtFix = &PedFrtFix //PROC, GRAVA PEDIDO GravaPedidoVenda.Call(TrnMode.Update, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &sdtGravaPedido, &wwpContext.PesCod, &wwpContext.UserName) GravaNotaTemporariaVenda.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, '55') wpImprimeAgrupamento.Popup(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod) Endif Endif Endif //CLIENTE endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoEmitirNFe' do 'loadTipoLancamento' if &IsErroTipoLancamento = false do 'LoadCliente' if &IsErroCliente = false if &PossuiModuloAGRO_INSUMOS = 'S' do 'propriedadecliente' Endif if &IsErroPropriedade = False //and &IsErroGleba = false //If &PedFrpTip = TipoDuplicata.DEPOSITO and &PedCbrCod.IsEmpty() // &mensagem = 'Informado Tipo de Pagamento: DEPOSITO/TRANSF. e NÃO INFORMADO o Local Cobrança/Conta Bancária' // do 'mensagemErro' // &PedCbrCod.SetFocus() //Else do 'LoadTransportadoraRedespacho' if &IsErroTransportadoraRedespacho = false or &PedTipFrt = '9' CarregaSdtPedidoVenda.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &sdtGravaPedido) //ADICIONA CAMPOS ALTERADOS &sdtGravaPedido.PedCliCod = &PedCliCod &sdtGravaPedido.LctCod = &LctCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedPrpCod = &PedPrpCod //TRANSPORTE &sdtGravaPedido.PedTraRedCod = &PedTraRedCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedTipFrt = &PedTipFrt &sdtGravaPedido.PedTraSaiCod = &PedTraRedCod &sdtGravaPedido.PedTipSaiFrt = &PedTipFrt &sdtGravaPedido.PedObsEst = '#JASPI#AGRUPARFATURAR#' &sdtGravaPedido.PedObsNfe = &PedObsNfe &sdtGravaPedido.PedVlrDscGlb = &PedVlrDscGlb &sdtGravaPedido.PedVlrOut = &PedVlrOut &sdtGravaPedido.PedFrtFix = &PedFrtFix //PROC, GRAVA PEDIDO GravaPedidoVenda_Remessa.Call(TrnMode.Update, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &sdtGravaPedido) GravaNotaTemporariaVenda.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, '55') wpSelecionaProdutosnFe.Link(&DeOndeVem, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod) Endif Endif Endif //CLIENTE endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoVerificarDevolucoes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ VerificarDevolucoes_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event VerificarDevolucoes_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcVerificarDevolucao.Create(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &CollDevolucao) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event VerificarDevolucoes_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'CheckSecurityForActions' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If not (&QtdDevolucao >= 1) BtnVerificarDevolucoes.Visible = False Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If not (&QtdDevolucao >= 1) tbInformaDevolucao.Visible = False Endif EndSub Event &PedPrpCod.IsValid if &PossuiModuloAGRO_INSUMOS = 'S' do 'propriedadecliente' Endif EndEvent Event &PedCliCodVar.IsValid retornaSoNumeros.Call(&PedCliCodVar, &PedCliCodVar) &PedCliCod = val(&PedCliCodVar) do 'LoadCliente' &OldPedCliCod = &PedCliCod EndEvent Event &PesRazVar.IsValid RetornaCodigoPEssoaSugestNome.Call(&EmpCod, &PesRazVar, &PedCliCod) if &PesRazVar.IsEmpty() and not &PedCliCodVar.IsEmpty() &PedCliCod = val(&PedCliCodVar) EndIf do 'loadCliente' &OldPedCliCod = &PedCliCod EndEvent Event &LctCodvar.IsValid retornaSoNumeros.Call(&LctCodvar, &LctCodvar) &LctCod = val(&LctCodvar) do 'loadTipoLancamento' EndEvent Event &LctNom.IsValid RetornaCodigoTipoLancamentoSugg.Call(&EmpCod, &LctNom, &LctCod) if &LctNom.IsEmpty() and not &LctCodvar.IsEmpty() &LctCod = val(&LctCodvar) EndIf do 'loadTipoLancamento' EndEvent Event &PedTraRedRaz.IsValid RetornaCodigoPEssoaSugestNome.Call(&EmpCod, &PedTraRedRaz, &PedTraRedCod) if &PedTraRedRaz.IsEmpty() and not &PedTraRedCodVar.IsEmpty() &PedTraRedCod = val(&PedTraRedCodVar) Endif do 'loadTransportadoraRedespacho' EndEvent Event &PedTraRedCodVar.IsValid retornaSoNumeros.Call(&PedTraRedCodVar, &PedTraRedCodVar) &PedTraredCod = val(&PedTraRedCodVar) do 'loadTransportadoraRedespacho' EndEvent Event &actioUpda.Click If PedItmCod <> 0 DeletaItemPedidoCompra.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, PedItmCod) grid.Refresh() EndIF EndEvent Sub 'VerificaDevolucoes' &CollDevolucao.Clear() &CollPedCliCod.Clear() &IsTemDevolucoes = False &QtdDevolucao = 0 For &sdtPedidosItem In &sdtPedidos &IsClienteEncontrado = False &AuxPedCliCod = &sdtPedidosItem.PedCliCod For &AuxAuxPedCliCod In &CollPedCliCod If &AuxAuxPedCliCod = &AuxPedCliCod &IsClienteEncontrado = True Exit // Sai do loop, pois o valor já está na coleção EndIf EndFor If Not &IsClienteEncontrado &CollPedCliCod.Add(&AuxPedCliCod) EndIf EndFor For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod Where FilCod = &wwpContext.FilCod Where CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA Where CreVlrSdo > 0 Where CreCliCod In &CollPedCliCod Where LctTip = TipoLancamento.DevolucaoVenda &CollDevolucao.Add(CreCod) &QtdDevolucao += 1 EndFor EndSub Sub 'VisibleIvisible' tbPropriedades.Visible = (&PossuiModuloAGRO_INSUMOS = 'S') EndSub Sub 'mensagemErro' if &IsNoMensagem <> true Msg(&mensagem) Endif EndSub Sub 'LoadTipoLancamento' &IsErroTipoLancamento = false For Each Order EmpCod, LctCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where LctCod = &LctCod &LctCodvar = trim(Str(&LctCod)) &LctCodNom = LctCodNom &LctAtuEst = LctAtuEst Exit When None &mensagem = 'Tipo Lançamento é obrigatório!' do 'mensagemErro' &IsErroTipoLancamento = true EndFor &LctNom = &LctCodNom EndSub Sub 'LoadPedido' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod &LctCodvar = trim(str(LctCod)) &PedCliCod = PedCliCod &LctCod = LctCod //TRANSPORTE &PedTraRedCod = PedTraRedCod &PedTipFrt = PedTipFrt &PedObsNfe = PedObsNfe &PedVlrDscGlb = PedVlrDscGlb &PedVlrOut = PedVlrOut &PedFrtFix = PedFrtFix &PedVlrBrt = PedVlrBrt &PedVlrLiq = PedVlrLiq //FROM JSON NAO MUDAR &sdtPedidos.FromJson(PedObsAna) Exit EndFor if &PedPrpCod <> 0 do 'propriedadecliente' Endif if not &LctCod.IsEmpty() do 'loadTipoLAncamento' Endif if not &PedCliCod.IsEmpty() do 'LoadCliente' Endif if not &PedTraRedCod.IsEmpty() and &PedTipFrt <> '9' do 'loadTransportadoraRedespacho' Endif EndSub Sub 'loadTransportadoraRedespacho' &PesCodRazSugg = '' &IsErroTransportadoraRedespacho= false if &PedTipFrt <> '9' For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &PedTraRedCod &PedTraRedCodVar = trim(str(&PedTraRedCod)) &PesCodRazSugg = PesCodRazSugg do case CAse PesIsTra.IsEmpty() &IsErroTransportadoraRedespacho = true &mensagem = 'Transportadora Redespacho Inválida!' do 'mensagemErro' Case PesSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO &IsErroTransportadoraRedespacho = true &mensagem = 'ATENÇÃO! Transportadora Redespacho está com status Inativo. Verifique!' do 'mensagemErro' EndCase Exit When none &IsErroTransportadoraRedespacho = true &mensagem = 'Transportadora Redespacho não localizada, Inválida!' do 'mensagemErro' EndFor &PedTraRedRaz = &PesCodRazSugg EndIf EndSub Sub 'propriedadecliente' &IsErroPropriedade = False &PedPrpNom.SetEmpty() &PedPrpEnd.SetEmpty() &PedPrpIns.SetEmpty() For each Order EmpCod,PesCod,PesPrpCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &PedCliCod Where PesPrpCod = &PedPrpCod &PedPrpNom = PesPrpNom &PedPrpEnd = trim(PesPrpEnd)+', '+trim(PesPrpNro)+' - '+trim(PesPrpBai)+' - '+trim(PesPrpCidNom)+'-'+PesPrpCidUfeCod &PedPrpIns = PesPrpIns &PedPrpDen = PesPrpEndDen exit When none if &PedPrpCod <> 0 &mensagem = 'Propriedade do cliente inválido, Verifique!' do 'mensagemErro' &IsErroPropriedade = true Else &PedPrpNom = 'PROPRIEDADE NAO INFORMADA' &PedPrpIns = 'ISENTO' Endif EndFor EndSub Sub 'LoadCliente' &IsErroCliente = false &PedCliObs = '' &PesCodRazSugg = '' For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &PedCliCod &PesCodRazSugg = PesCodRazSugg &PedCliCodVar = trim(str(&PedCliCod)) &PedCliObs = trim(PesObs) + ' ' + trim(PesObsMas) &PedCliObs = &PedCliObs.Trim() Exit When none &IsErroCliente = true &mensagem = 'Cliente é obrigatório!' do 'mensagemErro' EndFor &PesRazVar = &PesCodRazSugg EndSub
